drills.title: Reported Speech Part 2 — Questions & Commands — Speaking Set 1

sentences.hindi: उसने पूछा, "क्या तुम आ रहे हो?"

sentences.english: He asked if I was coming.
sentences.hindi: उसने पूछा कि क्या मैं आ रहा था।
sentences.pronunciation: he asked if i was coming

sentences.hindi: उसने पूछा, "तुम कहाँ रहते हो?"

drills.title: Reported Speech Part 2 — Questions & Commands — Speaking Set 2

sentences.hindi: उसने पूछा कि मैं कहाँ रहता था।
उसने कहा, "यह काम करो।"

sentences.english: He told me to do this work.
sentences.hindi: उसने मुझे यह काम करने को कहा।
sentences.pronunciation: he told me to do this work

drills.title: Reported Speech Part 2 — Questions & Commands — Speaking Set 3

sentences.hindi: उसने कहा, "यहाँ मत आओ।"

sentences.english: She told me not to come here.
sentences.hindi: उसने मुझे यहाँ न आने को कहा।
sentences.pronunciation: she told me not to come here

sentences.hindi: उन्होंने पूछा, "क्या तुम तैयार हो?"

drills.title: Reported Speech Part 2 — Questions & Commands — Speaking Set 4

sentences.english: They asked if I was ready.
sentences.hindi: उन्होंने पूछा कि क्या मैं तैयार था।
sentences.pronunciation: they asked if i was ready

sentences.hindi: उसने पूछा, "तुम क्या कर रहे हो?"

sentences.english: He asked what I was doing.
sentences.hindi: उसने पूछा कि मैं क्या कर रहा था।
sentences.pronunciation: he asked what i was doing

drills.title: Reported Speech Part 2 — Questions & Commands — Speaking Set 5

sentences.hindi: टीचर ने कहा, "चुप रहो।"

sentences.english: The teacher told us to be quiet.
sentences.hindi: टीचर ने हमें चुप रहने को कहा।
sentences.pronunciation: the teacher told us to be quiet

sentences.hindi: उसने पूछा, "तुम कब आओगे?"

drills.title: Reported Speech Part 2 — Questions & Commands — Speaking Set 6

sentences.english: She asked when I would come.
sentences.hindi: उसने पूछा कि मैं कब आऊँगा।
sentences.pronunciation: she asked when i would come

sentences.hindi: डॉक्टर ने कहा, "दवा लो।"

sentences.english: The doctor told me to take medicine.
sentences.hindi: डॉक्टर ने मुझे दवा लेने को कहा।
sentences.pronunciation: the doctor told me to take medicine

drills.title: Reported Speech Part 2 — Questions & Commands — Speaking Set 7

sentences.hindi: उसने पूछा, "क्या तुम्हें मदद चाहिए?"

sentences.english: He asked if I needed help.
sentences.hindi: उसने पूछा कि क्या मुझे मदद चाहिए थी।
sentences.pronunciation: he asked if i needed help
